# agents-standard

> Specification for the AGENTS.md hierarchical configuration standard.
> One file convention, five-tier loading, all agents.
> Note: This project spans two repositories: the specification/CLI repository (nbiish/agents-standard) and the website/documentation repository (nbiish/agentsstandard-dot-com). We actively work on both repositories to maintain consistency between the online docs and the core specifications/CLI tools.

## Version

1.4.0

## The Standard

The standard unifies project instructions by separating **what/why** (Project PRD) from **how** (Behavioral Rules):

* **`llms.txt` (Project PRD)**: Located at `{project_root}/llms.txt`. Defines active goals, roadmap, and scope.
* **`AGENTS.md` (Behavioral Cascade)**: Cascades across four scopes (`Global Base`, `Project Base`, `Project Active`, `Folder`). Defines safety, coding preferences, and guidelines.

## Resolution Order

1. Load `~/.agents/AGENTS.md` (global base — loaded first, user safety/preferences)
2. Load `{project_root}/llms.txt` (project PRD — loaded second, functional requirements)
3. Load `{project_root}/.agents/AGENTS.md` (project base rules — loaded third, committed guidelines)
4. Load `{project_root}/AGENTS.md` (project active rules — loaded fourth, active constraints, symlinked)
5. Load `{cwd}/AGENTS.md` if cwd is within project boundary (folder-specific rules — loaded last, component overrides)

Most specific rules win (folder > active > project base > global). Each layer extends, not replaces.

## Agent Coverage

23 agents tracked in the CLI with verified config file paths.
30 agents tracked overall with verified config file paths, MCP config locations, and docs URLs.
Full structured data: https://agentsstandard.com/agents.json

## Agents with Native AGENTS.md Support

- Pi — reads ~/.agents/AGENTS.md and .agents/AGENTS.md
- CodeWhale — reads ~/.agents/AGENTS.md natively and AGENTS.md at project root
- Kilo Code — reads AGENTS.md at project root
- OpenCode — reads AGENTS.md at project root
- Deep Agents (dcode) — reads .deepagents/AGENTS.md and AGENTS.md
- Zed — reads AGENTS.md at project root and ~/.config/zed/AGENTS.md globally

All other agents can symlink ~/.agents/AGENTS.md into their config location.

## CLI Tool

**Location**: `cli/index.js` — Zero dependencies, Node.js >=16 built-ins only.

**Install**:
```
npm install -g agents-standard
```
Or run directly: `node cli/index.js`

### Commands

| Command | Flag | Description |
|---------|------|-------------|
| Interactive TUI | _(default)_ | Checkbox-based TUI to toggle symlinks per agent |
| List status | `--list` / `-l` | Print all agents with current link status |
| Link all | `--link-all` / `-a` | Non-interactive: symlink all supported agents |
| Set depth | `--depth N` | Set AGENTS_DEPTH (1–10), prints to stdout |
| Version | `--version` / `-v` | Print CLI version |
| Help | `--help` / `-h` | Show usage and key bindings |

### Interactive TUI

Navigate a list of 23 agents, toggle symlink creation on/off with space, then submit all changes at once.

**Key Bindings**:

| Key | Action |
|-----|--------|
| `↑` `↓` / `j` `k` | Navigate agent list |
| `Space` | Toggle symlink on/off for selected agent |
| `Enter` | Submit changes (when cursor is on "Submit changes" bar) |
| `d` | Cycle AGENTS_DEPTH (1–5) |
| `g` | Change global AGENTS.md path |
| `q` | Quit |
| `Ctrl+C` | Quit |

**What Submit does**:
- Creates symlinks from `~/.agents/AGENTS.md` to each toggled agent's global config path
- Removes symlinks for agents toggled off (only if they point to our global file)
- Creates `~/.agents/AGENTS.md` with a starter template if it doesn't exist
- Writes `export AGENTS_DEPTH=N` to `~/.zshenv`, `~/.bashrc`, and `~/.profile`

### Agent List (CLI)

| Agent | Global Path | Type |
|-------|------------|------|
| Pi | — | native (reads ~/.agents/AGENTS.md) |
| CodeWhale | — | native (reads ~/.agents/AGENTS.md) |
| Claude Code | `~/.claude/CLAUDE.md` | symlink |
| Agy / Gemini CLI | `~/.gemini/GEMINI.md` | symlink |
| OpenAI Codex | `~/.codex/instructions.md` | symlink |
| Cursor | `~/.cursor/rules/agents-standard` | symlink |
| Windsurf | `~/.codeium/windsurf/rules` | symlink |
| Cline | `~/.cline/cline_rules` | symlink |
| Roo Code | `~/.roo/rules/agents-standard` | symlink |
| Kiro | `~/.kiro/kiro.md` | symlink |
| Augment | `~/.augment/guidelines` | symlink |
| Goose | `~/.config/goose/goosehints` | symlink |
| Junie | `~/.junie/guidelines.md` | symlink |
| Trae | `~/.trae/rules/agents-standard` | symlink |
| Crush | `~/.config/crush/crush.md` | symlink |
| Hermes Agent | `~/.hermes/SOUL.md` | symlink |
| MiniCC | `~/.minicc/AGENTS.md` | symlink |
| Deep Agents (dcode) | `~/.deepagents/AGENTS.md` | symlink |
| Zed | `~/.config/zed/AGENTS.md` | symlink |
| Aider | `~/.aider.conf.yml` | YAML format — manual setup |
| Continue | `~/.continue/config.json` | JSON format — manual setup |
| GitHub Copilot | — | project-only, no global file |
| Warp | — | settings UI, no global file |

### Environment Variables

| Variable | Purpose | Default |
|----------|---------|---------|
| `AGENTS_DEPTH` | Controls how many directory tiers load AGENTS.md (1=global only, 3=default) | `3` |
| `AGENTS_PATH` | Override the global AGENTS.md path | `~/.agents/AGENTS.md` |

## Standard Directory Layout

```
# Global ~/.agents/ (behavior + tooling)
~/.agents/
├── AGENTS.md              <- Behavior rules (global base, loaded first)
├── mcp-settings.json      <- MCP server configs (universal)
└── skills/                <- Agent Skills
    └── **/SKILL.md

# Project .agents/ (tooling + project base rules)
{project}/.agents/
├── AGENTS.md              <- Project base rules (committed rules for tech stack, deployment)
├── mcp-settings.json      <- Project-specific MCP servers
└── skills/                <- Project-specific agent skills
    └── **/SKILL.md
```

## Format

Plain Markdown. No YAML frontmatter. No schema.

## Links

- Website: https://agentsstandard.com
- Spec repo: https://github.com/nbiish/agents-standard
- Site repo: https://github.com/nbiish/agentsstandard-dot-com
- Structured data: https://agentsstandard.com/agents.json
- Setup script: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nbiish/agents-standard/main/setup.sh

## Development Status & Context

- **Recent Updates (v1.4.0)**:
  - CLI TUI now features space-bar toggling and a "Submit changes" confirmation bar at the bottom.
  - Added **Zed** (`~/.config/zed/AGENTS.md`) and **CodeWhale** (`~/.agents/AGENTS.md`, native) to the CLI agent list.
  - Fixed keypress event handling (`readline.emitKeypressEvents`) so interactive input works correctly.
  - Added TTY detection — non-TTY environments get a helpful error instead of a crash.
  - Added `--version` / `-v` flag.
  - `q` key now properly exits the TUI (previously set a flag that was never checked).
  - Terminal row count falls back to 24 when `process.stdout.rows` is undefined.
  - Version bumped to 1.4.0 across `package.json` and TUI header.
  - Fully synchronized all specification tables, JSON files, and CLI sources between `agentsstandard-dot-com` (website/docs repo) and `agents-standard` (spec/CLI repo).
- **Current Goals & Iterations**:
  - Track downstream adoption of standard directories and global configurations.
  - Keep agent configuration mappings updated in `agents.json` as new agents add support.
  - Maintain the automated CLI link system matching the latest `agents.json` metadata.
